ruleScores.ruleName: Every Rule Has Severity and Enforcement
Every Rule Has a Bad → Good Example
Agent Document Has Version and Last-Updated

strengths: All 7 required sections present: Meta, Purpose, Applicability, Rules, Exceptions, Checklist, Tool Integration
All 8 rules properly formatted with severity [BLOCKER/CRITICAL/WARNING] and enforcement [BLOCKED/PREVENTED/REVIEWED] labels
Rule count of 8 is within the required 5-9 range
Every rule includes concrete Bad → Good code examples with clear violations and corrections
Related section clearly defines boundaries with Architecture, Security, and Observability agents
Enforcement tools are specifically named (ESLint Custom Rule, TypeScript Type Guards, Static Analysis, etc.)
YAML frontmatter includes version: 1.0 and last_updated: 2026-04-09
Checklist has exactly 8 items matching the 8 rules in the same order
